career_services.drop_in: Wed in-person SSB 3050 12-2pm; Thu virtual via Zoom 2-4pm

campus_jobs.work_study: Must request on financial aid notification. Find jobs via Handshake.
campus_jobs.international_students: F-1/J-1 can work on campus up to 20 hours/week during school, full-time during breaks

internships.start_search: At least one semester before desired start date
internships.for_credit: Check if your college offers an internship course for credit
internships.international: CPT for academically required off-campus training. OPT after graduation.

grad_assistantships.ta: Leads discussion sections, holds office hours, grades
grad_assistantships.ra: Conducts experiments, analyzes data, contributes to publications
grad_assistantships.how_to_find: Contact Director of Graduate Studies in your program. Check HR Jobs Board.
grad_assistantships.tuition_waiver: 25%-67% appointments get tuition waiver for 91+ continuous days

outcomes.description: First destination outcomes for bachelor's degree graduates within 6 months

dei_resources: https://careerservices.uic.edu/students/dei-career-resources/ — resources for 15+ identity groups including international students, LGBTQA+, veterans, undocumented/DACA, and more.
